landing.heroSubtitle: Merlin analyzes the job posting, identifies what the recruiter is looking for, and rewrites your resume to maximize your chances. All in minutes.
landing.step1Desc: Upload your PDF or DOCX. AI structures your data automatically.
landing.step2Desc: Answer questions about your experience to enrich your profile.
landing.step3Desc: Paste the job description and get a full analysis with ATS score.
landing.step4Desc: Get a personalized resume and cover letter tailored to the job.
landing.feature1Desc: Strategic keywords positioned at the highest scan points of automated screening systems.
landing.feature2Desc: Detects the job language and generates the resume in the correct language automatically.
landing.feature3Desc: Google Cloud infrastructure, Firebase authentication, and privacy law compliance.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Create your account and generate up to 5 personalized resumes per day, at no cost.
login.errorInvalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
login.errorGoogle: Error signing in with Google. Please try again.
signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Start personalizing your resume
signup.consent: I have read and accept the
signup.consentSuffix: , and authorize the processing of my data in accordance with applicable privacy laws.
signup.errorConsent: You must accept the Privacy Policy to continue.
signup.errorCreate: Error creating account. Check your information and try again.
signup.regionNotice: Currently available in Brazil and the United States.
signup.errorGoogle: Error signing in with Google. Please try again.
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: To get started, upload your resume and complete the interview. Then, you can personalize for as many jobs as you want.
dashboard.step1Desc: PDF or DOCX for intelligent analysis
dashboard.step2Desc: Chat with AI to enrich your profile
dashboard.noApplicationsDesc: Paste a job description to get started!
profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Upload resumes to enrich your profile. The more data, the better the personalization.
profile.uploadDesc: PDF or DOCX, max 10MB. You can upload multiple resumes.
profile.dragOrClick: Drag your resume or click to select
profile.clickToUploadAnother: Click or drag to upload another
profile.nextStepDesc: Paste a job to generate your personalized resume
profile.consolidatedDesc: Unified data from all your resumes and interviews
profile.lastUploadDesc: Data extracted from the most recent resume
profile.name: Name
profile.errorFileSize: File too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
profile.errorDelete: Error deleting resume. Please try again.
profile.errorProcess: We couldn't process your resume. Try another file.
profile.recommendationsDesc: AI-powered suggestions to improve your resume
profile.errorRecommendations: Error generating recommendations. Please try again.
job.title: New Job
job.subtitle: Paste the job description for analysis and resume generation.
job.descriptionSubtitle: Copy and paste the full description.
job.commentPlaceholder: E.g.: I have 3 years of experience leading remote teams...
job.disclaimerSubtitle: Read carefully before generating the document.
job.disclaimerP1: The resumes and cover letters generated by Merlin use artificial intelligence (AI) in an experimental capacity. AI can present "hallucinations" — this means the system may invent facts, experiences, dates, companies, positions, or qualifications that never existed in your professional history.
job.disclaimerP2: You are entirely responsible for reviewing, validating, and correcting all generated content before sending it to any employer or using it in any selection process. Submitting a resume with false information can have serious legal and professional consequences.
job.disclaimerP3: Ella Executive Search Ltda is not responsible for the content of generated documents, for lost opportunities, or for any damages arising from the use of inaccurate information produced by AI.
job.disclaimerAccept: I understand that AI-generated content may contain errors and fictitious information. I commit to fully reviewing the document before any use.
job.errorMinChars: The job description must be at least 50 characters.
job.errorAnalyze: Error analyzing the job. Please try again.
job.errorGenerate: Error generating resume. Please try again.
job.errorNoProfile: No profile found. Upload your resume first.
interview.title: Profile Interview
interview.chooseMode: Let's ask a few questions to enrich your profile. How would you like to answer?
interview.byVoiceDesc: Listen to the questions and respond by speaking. Your speech will be automatically transcribed.
interview.byTextDesc: Read the questions and type your answers at your own pace.
interview.completedDesc: Your answers have been processed and added to your profile. Now you can personalize resumes with much more accuracy.
interview.voiceInstructions: Listen to the question and respond by voice. You can edit the transcription afterwards.
interview.textInstructions: Answer the questions to enrich your profile. The more details, the better.
interview.question: Question {{number}}
interview.voicePlaceholder: Your transcribed answer will appear here. You can edit freely.
interview.voiceHint: You can record multiple times — text will accumulate. Edit freely before advancing.
interview.textHint: Answer with details — mention numbers, results, and examples when possible.
interview.errorNoAnswers: No answers were saved. Check your connection and try again.
interview.errorTranscribe: Could not transcribe the audio. Try again or type your answer.
interview.errorTranscribeGeneral: Error transcribing audio. Try again or type your answer.
interview.errorMicNotSupported: Your browser does not support audio recording. Use text mode.
interview.errorMicAccess: Could not access the microphone. Check browser permissions.
interview.errorNoProfile: No profile found. Upload your resume first.
interview.errorNoQuestions: Upload your resume first to generate the questions.
application.title: Application
application.regenerateInstruction: Generate a new version with a different approach.
versions.title: Versions
editor.noVersions: No versions available. Generate a resume first.
editor.noChanges: No tailoring changes recorded for this version.
editor.coverLetterWontUpdate: The cover letter won't update automatically. Use 'Regenerate' to update both.
linkedin.title: LinkedIn Optimizer
linkedin.subtitle: Analyze and improve your LinkedIn profile with AI to boost your visibility to recruiters.
linkedin.uploadHelp: How to export? On LinkedIn, go to Me > More > Save to PDF
linkedin.uploadDrop: Drag your LinkedIn PDF or click to select
linkedin.pastePlaceholder: Paste the text copied from your LinkedIn profile here...
linkedin.analyzingTime: Analysis may take up to 60 seconds
linkedin.crossRefDesc: Achievements and skills from your resume that are missing on LinkedIn
linkedin.errorUpload: Error processing the PDF. Try pasting the text manually.
linkedin.errorPaste: Error processing the text. Please try again.
linkedin.errorAnalyze: Error analyzing the profile. Please try again.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and personal data.
settings.name: Name
settings.privacySubtitle: Your rights under applicable privacy laws
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all your personal data in JSON format (right of access and portability).
settings.privacyPolicyDesc: How we collect, use, and protect your data
settings.termsOfServiceDesc: Rules for using the Merlin platform
settings.dpoDesc: To exercise any privacy right or ask questions:
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently removes your account and all associated data: profiles, resumes, applications, generated versions, and interview data. This action is irreversible.
settings.errorExport: Error exporting data. Please try again.
settings.errorDelete: Error deleting account. Please try again.
